title: Comprehensive Job Assistance Centers * Older Adults - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > Comprehensive Job Assistance Centers * Older Adults 1 Matching Service Providers Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF EASTERSEALS OREGON EASTERSEALS OREGON PORTLAND SENIOR COMMUNITY SERVICE EMPLOYMENT PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Assists those who seek employment, training assistance, and social engagement. Offers training assignments to develop current employment skills, resume and cover letter education, job readiness classes, and individual employment plans. 237 NE Broadway Street Suite 100 Portland, OR 97232 Eligibility: -Ages 55 and older, unemployed, and income for the last 6 months must be below 125% of the federal poverty guidelines. Social Security benefits and some other incomes do not count towards income. -Be unemployed and willing to obtain competitive employment -Priority given to veterans, spouses of veterans, homeless or at-risk of becoming homeless, and people with disabilities Hours: Monday-Thursday 8:30am-5pm, Friday 8:30am-4:30pm Email (503) 222-8500 Get Directions Visit Website More Details EASTERSEALS OREGON SENIOR COMMUNITY SERVICE EMPLOYMENT PROGRAM
